title: Nursery Rhyme. DXXX. Natural History.
content:
Hie hie, says Anthony,
        Puss in the pantry
        Gnawing, gnawing
        A mutton mutton-bone;
        See now she tumbles it,
        See now she mumbles it,
        See how she tosses
        The mutton mutton-bone.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DXXX. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
